description: Add Cal eProcure to the live procurement source catalog using database-backed search configuration, verify its public search path, and test the scanner behavior.

comments.text: Configured live Cal eProcure CSCR source 7b35ae03-78aa-4b38-9092-a1fb0fd42bf3 through Ash. Persisted 14 keyword filters, 7 verified department IDs, FI guest endpoint, result fields, and VM access diagnosis. Source is approved/manual but disabled so it cannot create false scan failures while the VM is blocked by HTTP 403/unreachable FI egress.

title: Configure Cal eProcure statewide discovery
